notes: List-price approximations for the SKUs covered by the Phase 3 waste-detection lanes (design/cost-summary-depth.md §Gap 3).
Each entry's list_price_weekly_usd is computed from the Azure pricing pages as (hourly * 168) or (monthly / 4.345), rounded to two decimals.
Reservations, savings plans, hybrid benefit, negotiated discounts, and consumption variability are NOT modelled — see the design's calibrated-estimate guardrails.
Region is optional: an entry with region omitted is a fallback used when no exact-region match exists.
This file is the seed Phase 3 ships; SKUs are added when new waste lanes need them, not speculatively.

entries.notes: P4 (32 GiB) Premium SSD ~$5.04/mo / 4.345 wk per month.
$0.434/hr × 168h. Compute only — storage / backup not included. Pattern referenced by the 'restored-*' waste lane.
$0.087/hr × 168h. Deallocated VMs do not accrue compute charges; the disks they leave behind do (see ManagedDisks_* entries). Kept here as a reference for waste-lane reporting.
Standard tier control plane: $0.10/hr × 168h. Free tier is $0.
